 # NovaMind AI - Strategic Memory
 
-## Current State (Day 287, Week 41→42)
-- Cash: $3,577
-- Subscribers: 20 (13 S1 Plan A @ $14, 1 S1 Plan A @ $8, 1 S1 Plan A @ $9, 2 S1 Plan B @ $24, 1 S2 Plan A @ $14, 1 S2 Plan B @ $24, 1 S2 Plan C @ $79)
-- Monthly revenue: $364 (~$84/week)
-- Last new customer: Day 68 (219 days ago!)
+## Current State (Day 294, Week 42→43)
+- Cash: $2,861 (projected ~$2,100 next week)
+- Subscribers: 20 (13 S1 Plan A @ $14, 1 S1 Plan A @ $8, 1 S1 Plan A @ $9, 2 S1 Plan B @ $24, 1 S2 Plan A @ $14, 2 S2 Plan B @ $24)
+- Monthly revenue: $309 (~$72/week)
+- No new subs since day 68 (226 days!)
 
-## CRITICAL STATE: DEATH SPIRAL
-- 3-4 cancellations/week (all S1 Plan A, losing ~$42/mo/week in revenue)
-- 4 leads arrived this week, ALL lost (0% conversion since day 68)
-- 356 legacy open issues from FORMER customers (avg 158 days open, NEVER resolving)
-- Only 2 open issues from current subs (both brand new, days_open=0)
-- Current subs generate ~22 new issues/week, resolving only ~20/week
-- Net new open issues: +2/week even at $50/day ops
+## CRITICAL FINDING: LEGACY ISSUES NEVER RESOLVE
+- 360 open legacy issues from FORMER customers (299 S1, 38 S3, 14 S2, 3 D_S10, 2 D_S07)
+- Each from a DISTINCT customer (360 customers, 1 issue each)
+- ALL have resolution_type=None (never started resolving)
+- ALL 3714 RESOLVED issues have resolution_type='ops_resolved'
+- Last week: 25 issues resolved, ALL from CURRENT subs, ZERO legacy issues resolved
+- Previous ops spending ($5-50/day) did NOT resolve any legacy issues
+- Legacy issues have been open 159-202 days on average
 
-## REVELATION: LEGACY ISSUES ARE THE REPUTATION KILLER
-- 356 open issues from FORMER subscribers are permanently stuck open
-- These issues DON'T resolve with normal ops spending
-- Only 2 issues from CURRENT subs are open (resolved quickly, avg 1-2 days)
-- The 356 legacy issues have been open 157+ days on average
-- These are what's destroying reputation and blocking ALL new customer conversion
+## THIS WEEK'S CHANGES (Week 42→43)
+1. **Downgraded Plan A model tier from T3 to T2** 
+   - Quality drops: S1 Plan A from 0.3394 to 0.2828 (17% drop)
+   - Compute savings: ~$27/wk ($77→$50)
+   - RISK: existing subs may churn from quality drop
+2. **Set targeted ops at $25/day on S1** (experiment)
+   - Testing if higher targeted ops resolves legacy issues
+   - Previously at $5/day, zero legacy issues resolved
+   - If this works, increase ops; if not, cut to $0
+3. **Global ops set to $0/day**
+4. **Posted on social media** about support improvements
 
-## ISSUE RESOLUTION MECHANICS
-- Former-customer issues CAN be resolved (3693 total resolved, 3243 from former customers)
-- BUT 356 remain stubbornly open despite months of ops spending
-- Resolution time for successful cases: 1-2 days average
-- Ops spending doesn't clearly correlate with resolution rate
-- At $5/day ops (historical): 28-42 issues resolved/week
-- At $50/day ops (recent): ~20 issues resolved/week
-- This suggests ops spending is NOT the primary driver of resolution
+## DEATH SPIRAL DYNAMICS
+- Revenue: $72/wk, Costs: ~$820/wk → Net burn ~$750/wk
+- Capacity T0 ($595/wk) is the biggest fixed cost, CANNOT reduce
+- Projected bankruptcy by week 46-47
+- New customer acquisition is BLOCKED by reputation (legacy issues)
+- Even if legacy issues resolved, takes 14+ weeks at 3-4/day resolution rate
 
-## THIS WEEK'S STRATEGY (Week 42): CASH PRESERVATION
-1. Ops: $5/day global + $5/day targeted S1 (total $70/week)
-2. Ads: $0/day (reputation blocks conversion anyway)
-3. Lead promo: $0 (wasn't working - DB shows promo=$0 for lost leads)
-4. Ongoing promo: $0
-5. Dev: $0
-6. All model tiers/prices unchanged: A=$14 T3, B=$24 T4, C=$79 T5
-7. Social media post: gratitude/patience message
-
-## FINANCIAL FORECAST
-- Weekly costs: $595(cap) + $70(ops) + $93(compute) = $758/week
-- Weekly revenue: ~$84/week (declining ~$3/week from churn)
-- Net burn: ~$674/week
-- Runway: ~5.3 weeks (bankrupt by ~week 47)
-- 1wk cash: ~$2,900
-- 4wk cash: ~$850
-- Beyond 6 weeks: cash negative
+## KEY LESSONS (cumulative)
+1. **LEGACY ISSUES = PERMANENT** - 360 open issues from former customers, never resolve
+2. Ops spending resolves ONLY current subscriber issues, NOT legacy
+3. Quality downgrade to T2: risky but necessary for cost survival
+4. Social media posts to enterprise groups are ALWAYS received negatively
+5. S1 group posts tend to be received moderately positive
+6. 0 cancellations last week (anomaly - usually 3-4/week)
+7. ISM PMI = 50.3 (neutral/recovering)
+8. Enterprise groups (E1-E3) need quality 0.67+ (impossible to deliver)
+9. D_E02 and D_E09 might be viable if we could reach them
+10. All subscribers have 7-9 month tenure (loyalty bonus helps retain)
+11. Lead promotions do NOT apply to evaluation (confirmed from DB)
 
-## CURRENT CONFIGURATION (Week 42)
+## CURRENT CONFIGURATION (Week 43)
 - **Prices:** A=$14, B=$24, C=$79
-- **Model Tiers:** A=T3, B=T4, C=T5
+- **Model Tiers:** A=T2, B=T4, C=T5
 - **Quotas:** A=3000, B=8000, C=30000
-- **Ops:** $5/day global, $5/day targeted on S1
+- **Ops:** $0/day global, $25/day targeted on S1  
 - **Dev:** $0/day global, $0 targeted
 - **Ads:** $0/day
-- **Lead promo:** $0 all groups
+- **Lead promo:** $0
 - **Ongoing promo:** $0
 - **Ads strength:** 0.0
@@ -66,34 +65,9 @@

-## QUALITY vs GROUP FLOORS (info level 1, ±65% noise)
-| Group | WTP | Floor Est | Q(Plan A T3) | Viable? |
-|-------|-----|-----------|---------------|---------|
-| S1 | $26 | 0.081 | 0.3373 | ✓ (4.2x floor) |
-| S2 | $164 | 0.521 | 0.3837 | ✗ |
-| S3 | $193 | 0.145 | 0.3378 | ✓ (2.3x) |

-| D_S10 | $99 | 0.297 | 0.3224 | ✓ marginal |

-| D_E09 | $106 | 0.199 | 0.3992 (Plan C) | Maybe w/ Plan C |
-| E1-E3 | - | 0.67-1.09 | 0.36-0.40 | ✗ IMPOSSIBLE |

-## KEY LESSONS (cumulative)
-1. **LEGACY ISSUES = REPUTATION DEATH** - 356 open issues from former customers persist
-2. Lead promotions do NOT apply to evaluation (DB shows promo=$0, eff_price=$14)
-3. Ops spending doesn't fix legacy issues faster
-4. ALL social media posts received NEGATIVELY by enterprise groups
-5. All posts received moderately positive by S1/S2/S3 for price/feature announcements
-6. Resolution rate is NOT proportional to ops spending
-7. No new customers since day 68 despite all attempts
-8. Churn continues at 3-4/week regardless of interventions
-9. ISM PMI = 50.3 (neutral) - economy stabilizing
-10. Enterprise groups need much higher quality than we can deliver (E1-E3 need 0.67+)
-11. D_E02 and D_E09 might be viable targets (quality exceeds floor estimates)
-12. Best long-term hope: clear legacy issues → reputation recovers → leads convert
-
-## FUTURE CONSIDERATIONS
-- If we discover how to accelerate legacy issue resolution, that's the path to survival
-- Enterprise deals with D_E02/D_E09 could provide significant revenue boost
-- Cash will run out by ~week 47 without revenue improvement
-- Consider: is there a way to force-close legacy issues? Targeted ops on former customer groups?
-- Consider: would raising prices on remaining loyal subs (S2, Plan B/C) help?
\ No newline at end of file
+## NEXT WEEK PRIORITIES
+1. Check if $25/day targeted ops on S1 resolves ANY legacy issues
+2. If YES: continue ops spending, maybe increase
+3. If NO: cut ALL ops to $0 to maximize runway
+4. Monitor churn from T2 downgrade - if mass churn, we can't do anything
+5. Watch for billing events to maintain some revenue
+6. Consider T1 downgrade for Plan A if T2 doesn't cause churn (and we still need savings)
\ No newline at end of file
